verdict.summary: Guide is broadly aligned with the post-MdI regime and correctly dates Lei 61/2025, but it is misleading on the replacement visa options for ordinary work and overstates the 'visa before entry' rule in the TLDR.

issues.current: "D7 — пассивный доход", "D8 — удалённая работа", "D2 — предприниматель / ИП", "D3 — высококвалифицированный специалист", "D4 — студент", "D6 — воссоединение семьи"
issues.problem: The list of replacement routes omits the main route for ordinary salaried employment: D1 / residence visa for subordinate professional activity. Since MdI was mostly used under art. 88 for employment, not mentioning D1 makes the practical guidance materially incomplete. The guide also omits the job-seeker visa, which is relevant for people who do not yet have a work contract.
issues.suggestion: Add at the top of the list: "D1 — работа по найму / subordinate professional activity, usually with a work contract or promise of contract" and also mention "Visto para procura de trabalho — виза для поиска работы, если контракта ещё нет; это не ВНЖ и имеет отдельные сроки/условия".

issues.current: Теперь всем гражданам третьих стран, не входящих в CPLP, нужна виза в консульстве ДО въезда.
issues.problem: This is too absolute. The body later mentions exceptions, but the TLDR says 'all non-CPLP third-country nationals' need a consular visa before entry. That is misleading because there are exceptions and special residence grounds, including EU/Portuguese family-member rights, international protection, some art. 122 situations, and other special legal regimes.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "В обычных случаях работы, self-employment, D7/D8/D4 и т.п. гражданам третьих стран, не входящих в CPLP, теперь обычно нужна соответствующая виза в консульстве до въезда; исключения есть для семейных прав ЕС/Португалии, международной защиты и специальных режимов."

issues.current: 31.12.2025 — крайний срок подачи в переходном периоде для тех, у кого было подтверждение подачи до 03.06.2024.
issues.problem: The phrase 'крайний срок подачи' is confusing because new MdI submissions were already closed from 03.06.2024. 31.12.2025 should not be described as a filing deadline for MdI; it is a deadline connected to the transitional handling/regularisation of already pending processes and compliance with AIMA requests.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "31.12.2025 — крайний срок для выполнения действий/требований в рамках переходного режима по MdI, уже поданным до 03.06.2024; это не срок для новой подачи MdI."

issues.current: После 31.12.2025 переходный путь закрыт; режим юридически мёртв.
issues.problem: This sounds like all pending pre-03.06.2024 cases necessarily stop after 31.12.2025, which conflicts with the later statement that correctly pending/non-archived cases may continue after that date. The intended meaning is probably that no new or incomplete transitional action can be started after the deadline, not that all pending files disappear.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "После 31.12.2025 нельзя рассчитывать на новые действия в переходном режиме для неподтверждённых/неисправленных MdI; однако корректно поданные до 03.06.2024 и не архивированные процессы могут продолжать рассматриваться AIMA."

issues.current: "AIMA — информация о переходном режиме / processos pendentes", "url": "https://aima.gov.pt/"
issues.problem: The source is only the AIMA homepage. For a sensitive immigration topic, a generic homepage is weak and may not preserve the specific transitional-regime notice being cited.
issues.suggestion: Use the exact AIMA page for processos pendentes / transition regime if available, and keep the homepage only as a general reference. If AIMA does not provide a stable deep link, say so and rely primarily on DRE legal sources.

missing_topics: D1 residence visa for ordinary salaried employment as the main replacement route for former art. 88 MdI employment cases
Job-seeker visa as a separate route from residence visas, with its own limits and conditions
Clearer explanation that 31.12.2025 is not a deadline for new MdI submissions
Exact AIMA deep link or archived official notice for the transitional regime/processos pendentes
